textPlain: This is just a company advertisement, not even one that’s well done.  They didn’t benchmark any of the real leaders in the space (reducto, extend, etc) and left Gemini out of the first two tests, presumably because it was the best performer (while also being multiple orders of magnitude cheaper).
Personally I use OpenAI models via the API for transcription of PDF files. Is there a big difference between them and Gemini models?
